price: Und Wir vernichteten keine Stadt, ohne daß sie Überbringer von Warnungen gehabt hätte,
arabic: وَمَآ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَرۡيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wamā ahlaknā min qaryatin illā lahā mundhirūna
